deleteSkillConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this skill? This will remove it from the filesystem.
importFromGithubDescription: Paste a GitHub tree URL or direct zip archive link to import a skill.
githubUrlHint: Public repositories only. The folder must contain a SKILL.md file.
emptyStateDescription: No skills installed yet. Add skills by opening the skills folder or importing from GitHub.
emptyStateHint: Create a folder like my-skill/SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter (name, description) following the Agent Skills spec.
skillsPageDescription: Install reusable agent skills from your filesystem or GitHub.
